text.title: Prompt Techniques — Output Contract
text.summary: One PromptLibrary entry persisted as JSON or YAML. Captures slug, version, model, prompt text, eval_score on the golden set, and timestamps.

list.item: eval_score — float in [0, 1] on a named golden set.

antipattern.reason: Untested entries cannot be promoted; reviewers cannot compare regression.

antipattern.description: owner is "team" or a Slack channel.
antipattern.reason: Anonymous prompts rot; chain of accountability needed.

example.code: { "slug": "summary-3-bullet", "version": "v2", "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "prompt": "Summarise in exactly 3 bullet points, each <= 15 words, factual tone.", "eval_score": 0.92, "golden_set_id": "summary-bench-2026q2", "created_at": "2026-05-22T12:00:00Z", "owner": "ml-eng:alice" }

example.note: Invalid: slug not kebab-case; version not v-prefixed; prompt too short; owner is team; eval_score missing.

list.item: eval_score recorded against a named golden set.
